START A PROJECT

Start with the idea. I’ll help shape the next step.

You do not need a perfect plan before reaching out. Send what you have below — the rough idea, the problem, the screenshots, or the thing you want cleaned up.

01

Rough ideas are fine.

02

Clear next steps come after.

03

Simple, organized, and easy to start.

PROJECT DETAILS

Tell me what you want to build, fix, or figure out.

This does not need to be perfect. Send the messy version — the idea, the problem, the screenshots, the links, or whatever you have so far.

No perfect plan needed. Just send what you have and I’ll help sort out the next step.

PROJECT SENT

Thanks for sending this over.

I’ll review your project details and reach back out by email. Once we hammer out the details, we’ll move the project over to Upwork so everything is organized in one place.
